summary: Pre-final year ECE undergrad at IIIT Allahabad with hands-on experience building production-grade full-stack systems. Currently Tech Lead at ADAinsys, shipping Node.js/Express APIs serving 100+ daily users. Strong in backend architecture, database optimization, and AI agent development using local LLMs.

bullets: Engineered production-grade RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.js supporting 100+ daily active users with robust error handling, request validation, and comprehensive logging; led 2 full-stack projects as Tech Lead managing sprint planning, code reviews, and technical decision-making

Redesigned PostgreSQL database schemas with normalization, indexing strategies, and query optimization achieving 30% faster data retrieval; implemented JWT authentication and RBAC securing 15+ API endpoints
Mentored 3-developer teams on two projects; established Git branching strategies and code review standards improving team velocity by 25% and reducing merge conflicts by 40%

experience.role: Tech Lead — No Dues Management System
bullets: Led development of automated student clearance platform using MERN stack with PostgreSQL for transaction management; implemented department-wise approval workflows with JWT authentication
Reduced manual processing time by 90% and enabled real-time status tracking for 500+ students

experience.role: Tech Lead — Timetable Design Web App
bullets: Built intelligent conflict-free scheduling engine using Node.js with constraint satisfaction algorithms managing 50+ courses across 10 classrooms with automatic clash detection
Standardized Git workflows including feature branching, CI practices, and code review processes improving team collaboration and code quality

education.degree: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering
education.coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Digital Logic Design, Signals & Systems, Communication Systems, VLSI, Computer Networks, AI/ML

projects.name: Financial AI Assistant — Production-Scale AI Agent
projects.description: Full-stack microservices financial assistant using Next.js 14, Express.js, TypeScript, Groq Llama 3.3-70b with RAG pipeline, real-time WebSocket communication, Prisma ORM, Yahoo Finance API, CoinGecko API, and TradingView charts. Delivers real-time NSE/BSE stock tracking, portfolio analytics, and live news aggregation.

projects.name: Jarvis AI-Agent — Voice-Controlled Computer Assistant
projects.description: Intelligent voice-controlled desktop assistant using Ollama LLM (zero cost), Python speech recognition, Spotify Web API, Windows PowerShell automation, and Playwright browser automation. Enables hands-free computer control including app launching, music management, and web navigation — fully offline, no cloud dependencies.
